option.name: text
option.value: i dont want dummy data now i this to work as a real app they customer signup in the first time via entering the phone number and verifying it then after the successful verification they have to enter there details such as name, nic, email and there address and once they lick verify email they must be able to verify that the moment they recieve the email and then move to the main screen where they can see a demo vehicle at time moving around sri lanka and there they can add their own vehicle while adding there vehicle they can also add there own device by the device imei number which must then be shown on the map
